props.cellSize: Sets size of each cell. A single number/string sets both width and height, or provide a `[width, height]` tuple.
props.columns: Explicit list of column keys. When omitted (and `item-column` is set), columns are derived from the items.
props.groupBy: Property name or function used to split items into separate column groups (e.g. by month).
props.groupGap: Spacing between column groups. Defaults to one cell width plus `gap`.
props.hideColumnHeaders: Hides the group labels rendered above each column group.
props.hideRowHeaders: Hides the row labels rendered to the left of the grid.
props.legend: Controls the threshold legend rendered below the grid. Pass `false` to hide it, or an object like `{ labels: ['Low', 'High'], cellSize: 16 }` to override the labels or cell size.
props.hover: Enables the hover interaction that scales a cell when pointed at.
props.hoverScale: Controls the cell's scale factor applied on hover when `hover` is enabled.
props.items: Data items to render. Each item is mapped to a single cell via the `item-*` accessors.
props.itemColumn: Property name or function that returns the column key of an item. When omitted, columns are inferred from row order (a new column is started whenever the row index wraps back).
props.itemProps: Additional props to pass to each `v-heatmap-cell`. Can be an object or a function that receives the cell and returns the props object.
props.itemRow: Property name or function that returns the row key of an item.
props.itemValue: Property name or function that returns the numeric value of an item, used for threshold color matching.
props.rows: Explicit list of row keys. When omitted, rows are derived from the items in insertion order.
props.thresholds: Either a list of `{ min, color }` thresholds (highest matching wins) or a linear scale `{ from, to }` that interpolates cell colors between two stops using `color-mix`.

slots.cell: Slot used to render custom content inside each cell. Receives the mapped `HeatmapCell`.
slots.group-header: Slot used to customize the group label shown above each column group. Receives the `group` and its `items`.
slots.legend: Slot used to fully override the legend. Receives the `thresholds`, current `disabledColors` set, and a `toggle` helper.
slots.row-header: Slot used to customize the row label shown on the left. Receives the `row` key and its `items`.
